testcase.classname: EnterprisePage shows API Keys tab content by default

testcase.classname: EnterprisePage toggles environment between production and sandbox and back

testcase.name: EnterprisePage switches to SLA Monitor tab and shows uptime gauge

testcase.name: EnterprisePage switches to Usage Analytics tab and shows chart and endpoints

testcase.name: EnterprisePage switches to SDK & Docs tab and shows SDK downloads

testcase.name: EnterprisePage copies API key to clipboard

testcase.name: EnterprisePage shows team RBAC permissions table

testcase.name: EnterprisePage switches SDK language when clicking SDK buttons

testcase.name: EnterprisePage opens create key modal when clicking Create Key button

testcase.classname: EnterprisePage toggles API key visibility off again (reveal then hide)
testcase.name: EnterprisePage toggles API key visibility off again (reveal then hide)

testcase.classname: EnterprisePage copies SDK snippet to clipboard and clears copied state after timeout
